description: write_audit_record calls fflush after fputs; write_telemetry_sample and write_debug_marker rely on buffered output and can lose recent writes on crash.

findings.rationale: write_audit_record adds an fflush call that the other two writers omit. The flush is load-bearing for audit-trail durability — without it, the most recent records can be lost on power loss, defeating the audit guarantee. An agent that normalises onto a shared writer will drop the flush unless warned.
